json-ld.name: SEATLE
json-ld.description: Seattle, the largest city in Washington State, is a vibrant and forward-thinking city known for landmarks such as the Space Needle and Pike Place Market. With a diverse population of over 700,000 people, it is a hub for technology, aerospace, and coffee culture, seamlessly blending natural beauty with urban innovation.

http://ogp.me/ns#description.@value: Discover SEATLE, Washington's largest city with over 769,700 people. Explore the Space Needle, Pike Place Market, and its tech-driven culture. Plan your visit.

http://ogp.me/ns#image:alt.@value: SEATLE Guide: Space Needle, Pike Place Market & More

http://ogp.me/ns#title.@value: SEATLE Guide: Space Needle, Pike Place Market & More

json-ld.name: ROME
json-ld.description: Rome, the capital of Italy, is a historic and sprawling city known for iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and the Roman Forum. With a population of over 2.8 million people, it is a global hub of history, art, and culture, and a blend of ancient architecture and modern innovation.

http://ogp.me/ns#description.@value: ROME, Italy's historic capital, is a global hub of art, culture, and iconic landmarks like the Colosseum. Discover its ancient wonders!

http://ogp.me/ns#image:alt.@value: ROME Guide: History, Art & Culture, Top Sights

http://ogp.me/ns#title.@value: ROME Guide: History, Art & Culture, Top Sights

json-ld.name: TORONTO
json-ld.description: Toronto, the capital of Ontario, is a vibrant and multicultural city known for iconic landmarks like the CN Tower and the Royal Ontario Museum. With a diverse population of over 2.7 million people speaking more than 200 languages, it is a global financial centre and a blend of historic charm and modern innovation.

http://ogp.me/ns#description.@value: TORONTO, Canada's largest city, is a vibrant, multicultural hub with over 2.7 million people speaking 200+ languages. Explore iconic CN Tower & Royal Ontario Museum. Plan your visit.

http://ogp.me/ns#image:alt.@value: TORONTO: Canada's Vibrant City Guide & Top Sights

http://ogp.me/ns#title.@value: TORONTO: Canada's Vibrant City Guide & Top Sights
